title: rhododendron × calycinum
intro: Rhododendron × calycinum, also known as the Calycorhiza or Rhododendron hybrid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron × calycinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant. Rhododendron × calycinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
